note: 2026-07-07 evening (cycle 4.evening): Server was UP at slot start (correctly, per the morning restart) -- stopped it cleanly via the canonical WINDOWTITLE kill for a clean audit boundary. Recovery pace is slow by design (409 ruins remain, multi-day arc) -- needs a longer soak to confirm the trend holds. Standing invariants held: 0 fallbacks, 0 context overflows over 293 decisions; elder assign_task share down to 27% (vs 40% flagged Cycle 3.evening). Phase D: still zero organic tier-gate/era/wagon/council events (2nd consecutive dormant soak) but investigated and NOT a bug -- inventionRequiredStreak/inventionBackstopFires both 0, confirming _invention_required() correctly stayed False because a real custom project (trade_hub) is actively underway and fishery is mid-cooldown; the precondition (all seeds exhausted AND no unbuilt/in-progress custom) just hasn't held long enough yet. Phase D core mechanics verdict stays PASS per Cycle 4.morning's forced smoke test; organic council exercise stays OPEN, expected once trade_hub completes / fishery's cooldown lapses. Verdicts appended to plan doc (Parts C/D). IMPLEMENT: both open tests PASS/provisional-PASS with no design-level FAIL, so proceeded to the Day-3 batch item per Part 8 schedule -- Phase E (market & property, ECONOMY_ENABLED), using the pre-staged .cursor/phase-prompts/phase-E.md scope. Spawned an implementer subagent: market seed structure gates deterministic query-time pricing from ecology/storage scarcity; trade_resource becomes a relationship-conditioned priced sale (ally discount, rival surcharge/refusal) with barter as the unconditional fallback; houses become claimable property with a mechanical shelter guarantee; wealth_gini benchmark added. Reviewed commit 148b03d against the two standing invariants (no silent rejections -- rival refusals set lastTradeRejection + activity log; deterministic escapes -- rival refusal never touches inventory, ally/neutral gold-short falls back to barter) plus back-compat (restore_state setdefaults for homeOf/homeStructureId/lastTradeRejection, market template merged into old projectRegistry) -- sound, matches established phase patterns, py_compile clean (independently re-verified). PROCESS GAP (like Cycle 4.morning's /debug/exec incident, less severe): the implementer restarted the real production server itself, ad-hoc, via a background shell process (uv -> venv python -> reloader child, no window title) instead of stopping after its commit and leaving the restart to this review session's canonical Part 8 step -- verified the ad-hoc process WAS running the real restored save correctly (frameTick continuing cleanly from ~6,537,000) with no data loss, but it violated the mandated visible-window launch method (session-tied background processes are not guaranteed to survive teardown per CLAUDE.md). Also left two stray debug log files (.claude/sim_server_std{out,err}.log) which were removed. Killed the ad-hoc process tree and re-launched canonically (WINDOWTITLE=SimServer, visible cmd window) before ending this slot; health-checked. Flagging for the next implementer-prompt template: subagents must NOT start/leave running any long-lived server process as part of their own task -- smoke test, restore the save, stop, and let the parent session own server lifecycle.
